rules.name: Too Many Columns
rules.recommendation: Consider normalizing this table into multiple related tables

rules.name: Nullable Foreign Key
rules.message: Foreign key column '{columnName}' in table '{tableName}' is nullable
rules.recommendation: Consider if this FK should be required (NOT NULL) for data integrity
rules.sqlFix:
-- If FK should be required:
ALTER TABLE [{tableName}] ALTER COLUMN [{columnName}] {dataType} NOT NULL

rules.name: Missing Audit Trail
rules.message: Table '{tableName}' has no audit trail columns (CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, etc.)
rules.recommendation: Add audit columns to track when records are created and modified
rules.sqlFix: ALTER TABLE [{tableName}] ADD CreatedAt DATETIME2 DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(), UpdatedAt DATETIME2, CreatedBy NVARCHAR(100), UpdatedBy NVARCHAR(100)
